form.formComment: Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last preparation eighth of 11 at Hanshin December 28 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Roland Barows carrying 58.0kg at $88.50. When resuming last campaign second last of 16 at Kyoto November 22 over 2400m, 14 len behind Danon Cima with 58.0kg at $254.10. Expect a bold showing.
